---
name: Bug report
about: Something not working in OwnTV (playback, EPG, import, UI…)
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

<!-- Thanks for helping improve OwnTV! The more detail you give, the faster it gets fixed. -->

## Before you open this
Most reports are solved by one of these — please tick what you've checked:
- [ ] I searched existing issues and this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I checked the relevant **Settings** (e.g. HDR, Surround sound, Catch-up time, Video player)
- [ ] I tried **re-syncing the playlist** (Settings → Playlists → re-sync); for guide issues, re-synced EPG too
- [ ] I'm on the latest version (Settings → About)

## What happens
<!-- Describe the problem. What did you expect, and what happened instead? -->

## The on-screen error  ⚠️ important
<!-- When playback fails, OwnTV shows a friendly message AND a small "err: ..." line at the bottom of the
     player. Please copy that EXACT "err: ..." text here (or photograph it). -->
```
err: 
```

## Screenshot / photo
<!-- A screenshot, or a phone photo of the TV screen, helps a lot — especially the error screen. -->

## Steps to reproduce
1.
2.
3.

## Your setup
- **Device & model:** <!-- e.g. Fire TV Stick 4K Max / NVIDIA Shield / TCL Google TV -->
- **Fire OS / Android version:** <!-- Settings → My Fire TV → About, or Android version -->
- **OwnTV version:** <!-- Settings → About -->
- **Playlist type:** <!-- Xtream / M3U URL / local M3U file -->
- **Content type:** <!-- Live TV / Movie / Series / Catch-up / EPG -->

## Logcat (optional, but the most useful thing you can attach)
<!-- If you can, capture a logcat and attach it. Ask in the issue if you need the adb command.
     ⚠️ Please remove your username/password from the log if they appear in any URL. -->
